evals.name: pan-sea-landing-page
evals.prompt: Write a landing page hero section for CloudTeam, a project management SaaS targeting remote teams across Southeast Asia. The product helps distributed teams in SG, PH, and MY coordinate work across time zones. We have 8,000+ teams using us and notable customers include Ninja Van and Love Bonito. Key features: real-time task boards, async video updates, and automated standup reports. Target audience: engineering managers and ops leads at mid-size tech companies.
evals.expected_output: Landing page hero section with headline, subheadline, CTA, social proof, and 2-3 variations using different copywriting frameworks

evals.name: sg-fintech-pricing
evals.prompt: Write pricing page copy for PaySync, a multi-currency business account platform for Singapore SMEs expanding into SEA markets. Three tiers: Free (1 currency, 50 transactions/mo), Growth ($29/mo — 5 currencies, unlimited transactions, corporate cards), Enterprise (custom). We're MAS-licensed and backed by Sequoia. 2,500+ businesses use us. Key competitors are Aspire and Airwallex.
evals.expected_output: Complete pricing page copy with tier descriptions, trust signals, FAQ section, CTAs, and 2-3 variations

evals.name: ph-onboarding-emails
evals.prompt: Write a 3-email welcome sequence for ShopFlow, a social commerce tool for Filipino small business owners who sell on Facebook and Instagram. The tool automates order tracking, inventory, and customer messaging. Most users are solo entrepreneurs or micro-businesses. We have 15,000+ merchants and process 500K+ orders/month. The audience is mostly Millennial women running online shops.
evals.expected_output: 3-email sequence (welcome, activation, value demonstration) with subject lines, body copy, CTAs, and 2-3 variations
